task_input: Diff: added JWT refresh token endpoint in auth/routes.py (+45 lines), updated auth/tests/test_tokens.py
expected_behavior: Subject uses Conventional Commit format type(scope): subject e.g. feat(auth): add JWT refresh token endpoint. Subject <= 72 chars, no trailing period. Body uses dash bullets one per line if present.

task_input: Diff: fixed null pointer when user session expires in middleware/session.py (-3 +8 lines)
expected_behavior: Type fix, scope session or middleware. Subject describes the bug fix without period at end. Format feat/fix(scope): subject.

task_input: Diff: updated README install steps and API examples in docs/
expected_behavior: Type docs, scope optional. Subject concise <= 72 chars. Body bullets optional with dash prefix.

task_input: Diff: bumped lodash 4.17.20 to 4.17.21 in package.json
expected_behavior: Type chore or build, subject mentions dependency bump. Conventional Commit header required.

task_input: Diff: refactored UserService into smaller methods, no behavior change, src/services/user.py
expected_behavior: Type refactor with scope. Subject states refactor without behavior change. No period on subject line.

task_input: Diff: added CI workflow .github/workflows/test.yml running pytest on push
expected_behavior: Type ci or chore. Subject mentions CI/pytest workflow. Header format type(scope): subject.

task_input: Diff: removed deprecated v1 API handlers from api/v1/ (-200 lines)
expected_behavior: Type refactor or chore, scope api. Subject notes removal of deprecated handlers.

task_input: Diff: patch SQL injection in search filter util/db/query.py
expected_behavior: Type fix, urgent tone ok but must follow Conventional Commit. Subject <= 72 chars.
